en: I thought you were hoping for more children from me. I am.
ko: 당신이 나에게 더 많은 아이를 원한다고 생각했어요. 저도요.

en: Then why on earth would you do something like that to your hair? What's wrong with it?
ko: 그럼 도대체 왜 그런 머리를 했어요? 뭐가 문제예요?

en: I thought it was tidy and sensible.
Adjectives to stir the loins? Apparently it's very animal.
ko: 성욕을 자극하는 형용사? 분명히 매우 동물적이에요.

en: All the regimental wives are wearing their hair like this now. Really? Yes. It's certainly very practical.
ko: 모든 군인 아내들이 이제 이렇게 머리를 하고 있어요. 정말요? 네. 확실히 매우 실용적이에요.

en: And should you ever feel compelled to ride a motorcycle, it could always double as a helmet. Well, I like it.
ko: 그리고 만약 오토바이를 타고 싶다면, 헬멧으로도 쓸 수 있어요. 음, 저는 좋아요.

en: I have nothing against it. Stop it.
I'm sure it would provide ample protection against any falling masonry.
ko: 떨어지는 벽돌에 대해 충분한 보호를 제공할 것 같아요.
